mapper.sql: id, user_id, conversation_id, is_pinned, pinned_time, is_muted, is_archived, unread_count, last_read_message_id, draft_content, draft_time, is_deleted, deleted_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM im_user_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, update_time DESC
